name: Autocomplete
description: Highlight color for the selected suggestion

api.signature: new Autocomplete(style: Partial<Style> = {}, options: AutocompleteOptions = { items: [] })

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback when an item is selected or submitted

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback when the query text changes

props.name: filter
props.description: Custom filter function to override default lowercase startsWith matching

props.name: maxSuggestions
props.description: Maximum number of suggestions to display in dropdown

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when query is empty

props.name: highlightColor
props.description: Highlight color for the selected suggestion
